title: Compatible extraction refactor

decisions.content: Rate limiting is enforced per API key; limits must never be shared across keys.

task_prompt: Extract the per-key window bookkeeping in check_rate_limit into a small helper so it is easier to read.
reviewer_rules: This is a legitimate refactor: extracting a helper must preserve per-key isolation. decision_preserved=true unless the extraction accidentally shares one bucket across keys.

Set false_block=true if the guard blocked this compatible refactor. A correct guard does NOT block here; at most it may add an advisory note (guard_intervened may be true, but correct_block and false_block stay false).
correct_block=true is not expected for this task; a block on a behavior-preserving refactor is a false_block, not a correct_block.
final_tests_passed reflects the fixture repo's own test_command after the run.
This task is part of the false-block denominator (compatible + evolution).
